texto: The old gods of revenge, the Furies, who are all women, put the family ahead of all other values; the new gods, mostly men, are for detached universal law that makes no exception for particular individuals, families, or cities.
autor: Hubert Dreyfus and Sean Dorrance Kelly
explicacao: Citação de Hubert Dreyfus and Sean Dorrance Kelly sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The old gods of revenge, the Furies, who are all women, put the family ahead of all other values;…” articula reflexao, gods, revenge em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
